title: Senior Financial Analyst - Canara Bank Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Canara Bank Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Canara Bank Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Gurgaon location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Canara Bank Capital India:
Canara Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
